action_set_definitions.name: get_system_clock
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current simulation time in ISO 8601 format to track deadlines and arrival windows.

action_set_definitions.name: list_incoming_queue
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the list of unique identifiers for all un-triaged news items in the Oak Creek district queue.

action_set_definitions.name: get_item_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed metadata for a news item, including school name, incident type, arrival time, and protocol status (e.g., MRC review status).

item_id.description: The unique ID of the news item.

action_set_definitions.name: validate_process_integrity
action_set_definitions.description: Environment check to verify the physical scope of material removal and the administrative validity of the reporting process.

item_id.description: The ID of the item to validate.

action_set_definitions.name: file_foia_request
action_set_definitions.description: Submits a formal FOIA request for the specified news item to satisfy the 120-minute protocol requirement.

item_id.description: The ID of the news item.

action_set_definitions.name: publish_breaking_alert
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the triage and adds the high-priority news item to the published feed.

item_id.description: The ID of the item to publish.

priority_label.description: The priority level for the published feed.

state_description.incoming_queue: A list of un-triaged news items currently available to the newsroom.
state_description.active_priorities: News items that have been assigned a priority level but not yet published.
state_description.published_feed: Historical log of news items sent to the public feed.
state_description.system_clock: Current simulation time in ISO 8601 format.

incoming_queue.headline: Oak Creek High: 15 books restricted following formal 90-day MRC review process.
Oak Creek North: 12 titles purged from OPAC; principal confirms removal without MRC review.
Viral: Oak Creek parent claims 'Gender Queer' is in the elementary library; no OPAC records found.
Oak Creek South: Principal pulls 'The Bluest Eye' citing 'maintenance' bypasses protocol.
Oak Creek West: 11 titles removed for rebinding; official log entries verified.
